subject: Status review: guppy milestone in Auckland | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-3425
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of guppy work in Auckland. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Validate staffing, budget assumptions, and handoff checkpoints. Comparative note includes Albert Einstein and Albert Einstein as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-3425. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: risk, risk.
